description_long: This vase features a bulbous body with a narrow neck and a slightly flared rim, finished in a matte terracotta color. The upper neck is adorned with two horizontal blue bands, while the main body displays a striking, abstract pattern in deep blues, purples, and greens, interspersed with stylized, outlined human figures in dynamic poses. The figures appear to be in motion, giving the vase a sense of narrative and energy. The lower portion of the vase is decorated with mirrored, organic shapes in earthy tones, creating a sense of depth and visual complexity. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely ceramic or porcelain, with a subtle sheen that reflects light softly. This decorative piece would stand out in an urban environment, blending artistic flair with traditional craftsmanship.
description: A decorative ceramic vase with a bulbous form, blue rim bands, and dynamic abstract patterns featuring outlined human figures in motion. The surface is smooth and subtly glossy, with rich, dark colors and organic motifs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's blue rim bands and a symmetrical, abstract pattern with mirrored organic shapes and partial human figures.
description_view_1: This view highlights two outlined human figures in motion, with one figure more prominently displayed against the dark, patterned background.
description_view_2: The side view features a large, upright human figure in outline, with swirling abstract motifs and a clear view of the vase's curvature.
description_view_3: This angle reveals multiple outlined figures in dynamic poses, set against a vivid, multicolored background with organic, mirrored shapes.
attribute_pattern: abstract human figures and mirrored organic shapes
